title: CECO Environmental Agrees a $2.2 Billion Deal to Buy Thermon
description: CECO Environmental Corp. has agreed to acquire Thermon Group Holdings Inc., as the filtration company looks to enter the thermal solutions market amid booming demand from data centers.
content: CECO Environmental Corp. has agreed to acquire Thermon Group Holdings Inc., as the filtration company looks to enter the thermal solutions market amid booming demand from data centers.
